cards.back_flavor: Formerly known as the great vampire Kiss-Shot Acerola-Orion Heart-Under-Blade, she had lost most of her vampiric powers due to a twist of fate. At the behest of a middle-aged man in a Hawaiian shirt, she and Koyomi Araragi travel to Arkham, Massachusetts, to investigate the sinister beings that threaten to destroy the world.
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Trait Choice: At deck creation, choose 1 trait: Relic or Spirit Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 other cards of the chosen trait level 0-3. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Kokorowatari (Replica)‎ , Koyomi Araragi, Princess Beauty, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.flavor: "It's difficult to change the world on your own, but twisting it a little might not be all that hard."
cards.name: Shinobu Oshino
cards.text: Each Ally asset you control gains Linked. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy -- eat its remains: Heal 1 damage. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +0. If this test results in defeating an enemy, resolve Shinobu Oshino's "[reaction]" ability an additional time, ignoring its limit.

cards.name: Koyomi Araragi
cards.text: Permanent. Shinobu Oshino deck only. [reaction] After you heal 1 or more damage from Koyomi Araragi, exhaust him: Draw 1 card. Forced -- When Koyomi Araragi is defeated: Remove all damage from him and flip him.

cards.name: Koyomi Araragi
cards.text: Permanent (You cannot assign damage to Koyomi Araragi.) Forced -- At the end of the round: Take 1 direct horror. [action][action]: Flip Koyomi Araragi. Then, place 2 damage on him.

cards.flavor: "They extol me as beautiful, beautiful, but they say nothing more. They know nothing of what kind of person I am. They do not know how I am on the inside."
cards.name: Princess Beauty
cards.text: Revelation -- Remove all damage from Koyomi Araragi (Half-vampire) and flip him. If you cannot, take 1 damage and 1 horror.

cards.back_flavor: Revered as a model student in high school, Tsubasa Hanekawa has had a rough relationship with her stepparents. Nevertheless, she feigns a cheery appearance among her peers, masking her frustrations from the world. Then, along came the Sawarineko, a powerful cat spirit that possessed and assimilated with her being. For a whole decade, she has dealt with it's misdemeanor, unconsciously destroying the life of others. This doesn't mean the Sawarineko is entirely evil, and it might prove somewhat helpful at preventing the impending doom of the entire world.
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Trait Choice: At deck creation, choose either Spirit, Talent, or both traits. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker card ([seeker]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, cards of the chosen trait level 0-2 (level 0 if you have chosen both traits, instead), Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Black Hanekawa, Kako, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.flavor: "I don't know everything, I only know what I know."
cards.name: Tsubasa Hanekawa
cards.text:
[reaction] After 1 or more horror is placed on Tsubasa Hanekawa, take 1 horror: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may either take 1 direct horror, heal 1 horror, or ready Black Hanekawa.

cards.name: Black Hanekawa
cards.text: Permanent. Tsubasa Hanekawa deck only. While Tsubasa Hanekawa has 3 or fewer remaining sanity, Black Hanekawa gains: "Switch the base values of your [intellect] and [combat]. Switch the base values of your [willpower] and [agility]. [reaction] After you deal damage to an enemy by an attack, exhaust Black Hanekawa: Energy Drain. Either deal 1 additional damage or heal 1 horror."

cards.flavor: "...you're just dull when it comes to darkness. That just makes you... a failure as a creature."
cards.name: Kako
cards.text:
While Kako is in your hand you cannot trigger [reaction] abilities.
X is your remaining sanity.
Remove Kako from the game.

cards.back_flavor: A star player of Naoetsu High School's basketball team, Suruga Kanbaru had inhereted a strange-looking "monkey paw" that would seemingly grant her wishes. Unwittingly she had used it to overtake her adversaries and competitors, not knowing that it would summon a more malicious creature to do her bidding, the Rainy Devil. After the many events that have happened over the course of high schoolm she has suppressed the Rainy Devil's bidding to do it's malevolent actions. However, it wouldn't hurt at all to use it's deadly powers against those that intend to push the world into certain peril, as long as she has the will to control it, right?
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Trait Choice: At deck creation choose 2 out of 3 traits: Cursed, Trick, Tactic Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 other cards of the chosen traits level 0-2. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Monkey Paw, Valhalla Combo,, The Rainy Devil, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.flavor: "I start chasing all the rabbits I see and end up catching none of them."
cards.name: Suruga Kanbaru
cards.text:
Once per turn, you may evade an enemy not engaged with you at your location.
[reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more: Place 1 resource on Monkey Paw, as a wish. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. Place 1 resource on Monkey Paw, as a wish.

cards.name: Monkey Paw
cards.text:
Permanent. Suruga Kanbaru deck only. Limit 10 wishes on Monkey Paw.
[reaction] After your turn begins, spend 3 wishes: Choose one of the following -- Draw 2 cards, gain 3 resources, or take an additional action during your turn.

cards.flavor: One half of it.
cards.name: Valhalla Combo
cards.text:
Suruga Kanbaru deck only.
Play only during your turn.
Test [agility] (0). For each point you succeed by, gain 1 resource, to a maximum of X resources. X is the number of wishes on Monkey Paw.

cards.name: The Rainy Devil
cards.text: Revelation - If there are no wishes on Monkey Paw, shuffle The Rainy Devil back into your deck. Otherwise for each wish on Monkey Paw take 1 damage or 1 horror.

cards.back_flavor: Yotsugi Ononoki is not entirely human: She is a spirit bound in a corpse, revived to serve as a helper for her master, Yozuru Kagenui. Despite this anomaly, she still bears the weakness of being mortal. For the entirety of her life, she has been handling the menial tasks, the simple, boring ones. Now with the world in peril, this would be one task that would put her arcane skills and powers to the test.
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Trait Choice: At deck creation, choose either Spell and Ritual to be a primary trait and a secondary trait. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, cards of the chosen primary trait level 0-5, up to five other cards of the chosen secondary trait level 0-2. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Unlimited Rulebook ("I said with a posed look"),>/i, Unlimited Rulebook (Secession Version), Traverse the Veil, Debilitation, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.flavor: "Peace, peace."
cards.name: Yotsugi Ononoki
cards.text: Forced - After you discard 1 or more cards from the top of your deck: Draw each weakness discarded this way. [reaction] After you discard 1 or more cards from the top of your deck: Draw 1 Ritual card displayed this way. (Limit once per phase.) [elder_sign] effect: +X. Discard the top X cards of your deck. X is max 3.

cards.name: Unlimited Rulebook
cards.text: Yotsugi Ononoki deck only. Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. As an additional cost to initiate this ability, discard the top 3 cards of your deck. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. YOu get +1 [willpower] and deal +1 damage for this attack. [reaction] After you shuffle your discard pile back into your deck: Replenish this card's uses.

cards.name: Unlimited Rulebook
cards.text: Yotsugi Ononoki deck only. [action]: Evade. As an additional cost to initiate this ability, discard the top 3 cards of your deck. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility] and you get +1 [willpower]. If you succeed, you may exhaust Unlimited Rulebook to move up to 2 locations away.

cards.name: Debilitation
cards.text: Revelation - Put Debilitation into play in your threat area. Forced - When you would discard 1 or more cards from the top of your deck: Take 1 direct damage and 1 direct horror. Shuffle Debilitation into your deck.

cards.back_flavor: From the start, Hitagi Senjogahara's life had been rough, constantly having to fend for herself from the many tribulations of life. Things have been getting better however, as she works toward having a normal life. Despite this, she hasn't let her guard down, just cause life decides to go easy on her for a bit. Now presented the option to prevent the world from destruction, she is forced to return to her old inimical methods, even if she didn't want to.
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Trait Choice: At deck creation, either choose Insight or no trait. Deckbuilding Options: If you chose Insight: Insight cards level 0-5, Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-2, Neutral cards 0-5, up to five other level 0 Seeker cards ([seeker]). If you chose no trait: Survivor ([survivor]) cards level 0-5, Neutral cards 0-5, Insight cards level 0-2, up to five other level 0 Seeker cards ([seeker]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 2 copies of Limitless Stationery, Weightlessness, High-ranking Cult Member, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.flavor: "I'm not a friend of justice, I'm an enemy of evil."
cards.name: Hitagi Senjogahara
cards.text: [action]: Draw. Either draw 1 card, or choose and discard 1 card from your hand. You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to draw. [elder_sign] effect: +0. You may choose and discard 1 card from your hand to automatically succeed, instead.

cards.name: Weightlessness
cards.text:
Hitagi Senjogahara deck only.
Draw actions you perform do not provoke attacks of opportunity.
[reaction] After you discard 1 or more cards from your hand, exhaust Weightlessness: Draw 1 card or gain 1 resource.

cards.name: High-ranking Cult Member
cards.text: Prey - Hitagi Senjogahara only. Ambush. Hunter. Forced -- After you draw 1 or more cards or discard 1 or more cards from your hand during your turn while High-ranking Cult Member is engaged with you: It attacks you.

cards.name: Episode
cards.text: Linked. [reaction] When Episode is defeated: Deal 3 damage to an enemy at your location or a connecting location. Forced-- At the end of the round: You must either discard Episode or deal 1 direct damage to him.

cards.name: Kokorowatari (Replica)‎
cards.text: Exceptional. Shinobu Oshino deck only. [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. When you initiate this ability, you may exhaust Kokorowatari (Replica) to have this attack deal +1 damage. If this attack defeats a Monster enemy, you may ready Kokorowatari (Replica). After this attack resolves, you may take 1 damage to ready Kokorowatari (Replica).

cards.name: Musket Rifle
cards.text: Uses (1 ammo). Limit 1 ammo on Musket Rifle. [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. [action] Exhaust Musket Rifle: Fight. You can only target enemies engaged with you for this attack. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If this attack defeats an enemy, place 1 ammo on Musket Rifle.

cards.name: The Crimson Dagger
cards.text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed, you may exhaust The Crimson Dagger to deal +1 damage. [reaction] When you defeat an enemy with The Crimson Dagger: Place 1 resource on this card, as an offering. Forced-- When you resign or the game ends, if there are 4 or more offerings on this card: You earn 1 additional experience.

cards.name: Assail
cards.text: Fast. Play when an enemy engages another investigator at your location. Parley. Engage that enemy. Then, either (choose one): - Take 1 damage to deal 1 damage to that enemy. - If it is non-Elite, spend 1 resource to automatically evade that enemy.

cards.flavor: Hit me again, I dare you.
cards.name: Brace for Impact
cards.text:
Fast. Play when an enemy would attack investigator at your location.
You are considered to have taken that attack, instead. Instead of taking horror dealt from this attack, take that many damage. Then draw 1 card (You still take damage dealt by the attack).

cards.flavor: "Give me a moment, I'll remember soon enough."
cards.name: Exsanguinate
cards.text:
As an additional cost to play Exsanguinate, take 2 damage.
Draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Blood Offering
cards.text:
Permanent.
As an additional cost to purchase Blood Offering, you must either suffer 1 physical trauma, or this card cost 2 additional experience.
[reaction] When the game begins: Place 2 damage onto this card.
[free] Exhaust Blood Offering: Move 1 damage from Blood Offering to an enemy at your location.

cards.name: Critical Hit
cards.text: Max once per enemy. Fast. Play right after you succeed at a Fight ability on a Firearm asset by 3 or more. This attack deals +2 damage.

cards.name: Preemptive Strike
cards.text: Fast. Play after you draw an enemy from the encounter deck, but before it engages you. Fight. This attack targets the drawn enemy. Ignore the aloof and retaliate keywords for this attack.

cards.name: Disciplined
cards.text: When revealing chaos tokens for this skill test, each non-[auto_fail] symbol has the following effect, instead of its normal effects: "0. Reveal another token."

cards.name: Black Gloves
cards.text: Fast. Limit 1 per investigator. Play Black Gloves under the control of any investigator at your locations. [reaction] After you draw an Item asset that takes up at least 1 hand slot, exhaust Black Gloves and increase the cost of that asset by 1: Play that asset.

cards.name: Ruthlessness
cards.text: Limit 1 per investigator. [action][action] Exhaust Ruthlessness: Fight. One at a time, take 3 basic fight actions. You get +1 [combat] for the second attack. You get +2 [combat] for the third attack. If you succeed all three attacks, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.

cards.name: Yumewatari
cards.text: Uses(4 charges). If Yumewatari has no charges, discard it. Forced-- After Yumewatari enters play: Choose either hand slot or accessory slot. Yumewatari takes up 1 slot of the chosen type. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy, exhaust Yumewatari and spend 1 charge. Heal damage and/or horror equal to the enemy's printed damage and/or horror values.

cards.flavor: Where did you keep that?
cards.name: Conjure Weapon
cards.text:
As an additional cost to play Conjure Weapon, take 2 damage.
Search your deck for a Weapon asset and add it to your hand.

cards.flavor: It has become an established fact that topical application of vampiric blood seem to rapidly heal any physical wound, no matter the severity.
cards.name: Iron-Blooded
cards.text:
Exceptional. (Uses 5 charges).
[reaction] After an phase begins, exhaust Iron-Blooded and spend 1 charge: Ignore all damage and horror dealt to you by enemy attacks and/or encounter cards until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Katana
cards.text: [reaction] When you play Katana, increase its cost by 2: It gains fast. [reaction] When you play Katana, increase its cost by 2: Immediately trigger its "[action]" ability after playing it. (Max once per round). [action]: Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. After this attack resolves, return Katana to your hand.

cards.name: Kokorowatari (Replica)
cards.text: Exceptional. Shinobu Oshino deck only. [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. [action] Take 2 damage and exhaust Kokorowatari (Replica): Fight. You get +4 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. [reaction] After you defeat a Monster enemy with the Kokorowatari (Replica): Ready it.

cards.name: Railgun
cards.text: Researched. [action]: Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. This attack may target a non-Elite enemy at a connecting location; if you do, exhaust Railgun and you deal +2 damage instead, ignoring the aloof and retaliate keywords for this attack.

cards.name: Double Team
cards.text: Fight. Choose another investigator at your location. Both you and that investigator must fight the targeted enemy (you choose the order of who fights first). If both you and that investigator succeed this attack or the enemy is non-Elite, (both you and that investigator) defeat that enemy.

cards.name: Eviscerate
cards.text: Fast. Play only during your turn. As an additional cost to play Eviscerate choose a non-Elite enemy at your location and take damage equal to it's remaining health. Defeat the chosen enemy.

cards.name: Bloodthirsty
cards.text:
Fast. Play only when you have one remaining health.
Move up to four damage from your investigator card to an enemy at your location. For every 2 damage moved this way, take 1 horror.

cards.name: Book of Warding
cards.text: Uses 3 (Secrets). [reaction] When a nonElite enemy would engage you, if Book of Warding has secrets remaining: Test [intellect] (X). X is that enemy's evade value. If you succeed, spend 1 secret to automatically evade that enemy (it does not proceed to engage you).

cards.flavor: Just holding it in your hands makes you look particularly important.
cards.name: Detective Notebook
cards.text: Uses (3 Evidence). [reaction] When a non-Elite Humanoid enemy enters your location, exhaust Detective Notebook and spend 1 evidence: Parley. Exhause that enemy. Until the end of the round, when an investigator discovers a clue at that enemy's location, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

cards.name: Mathematical Proof
cards.text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate a location: Remember thatyou have proposed axiom X". X is the shroud value of that location. Forced -- After you have proposed axiom 1, 2, 3, and 4: Discard Mathematical Proof and heal 2 horror. Record in your campaign log that "you have proven the conuecture".

cards.name: Sodachi Oikura
cards.text:
Uses (4 Secrets).
[reaction] After you successfully investigate, exhaust Sodachi Oikaru: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may spend 1 secret to add any looked-at card with a total cost of less than or equal to X to your hand. X is the amount you succeeded this investigation by. Shuffle the remaining cards into your deck.

cards.name: Recall the Way Out
cards.text: Attach to your location. Group limit 1 copy of Recall the Way Out in play. Attached location gains: "[action] If you are the owner of this card: Move. One location at a time, move along the shortest path towards attached location. End this effect if your movement is blocked. You may trigger this ability from any location."

cards.flavor: "While it is true that an inherently free and scrupulous person may be destroyed, such an individual can never be enslaved or used as a blind tool."
cards.name: Scrupulous Study
cards.text: Investigate. one at a time, take three basic investigate actions.

cards.name: Traverse the Deep
cards.text:
As an additional cost to play Traverse the Deep, spend an action.
Attach Traverse the Deep to your location. Limit 1 in play.
[reaction] After you successfully investigate attached location, exhaust Traverse the Deep: Either take an investigate action when this test ends, or detach this card and attach it to a connecting location.

cards.name: Process of Elimination
cards.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
Choose either asset, skill, or event. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. If this test succeeds and any of the revealed cards is of the chosen type, add 1 of those cards to your hand. Place the revealed cards back to the top of your deck, in any order.

cards.name: Memory Palace
cards.text:
Permanent
As an additional cost to purchase Memory Palace, you must either suffer 1 mental trauma, or this card costs 2 additional experience.
After you purchase Memory Palace choose a level 0 non-exceptional event in your deck. You may add an additional copy of the chosen card to your deck. This card does not count towards your deck size or the number of copies of that card in your deck.

cards.flavor: In the 1950s, Japan became the pioneer in the photographic industry for designing more innovative medium format photography tools.
cards.name: Single-Lens Reflex Camera
cards.text:
Uses (3 Supplies).
[reaction] After you discover a clue at your location, exhaust Single-Lens Reflex Camera and spend 1 supply: Discover a clue at another revealed location with a lower printed shroud value than your location.

cards.name: Round Up
cards.text: [action][action] If there are no ready enemies at your location, exhaust Round Up: Investigate. One at a time, take three basic investigate actions. You get +1 [intellect] for the second investigation. You get +2 [intellect] for the third investigation.

cards.name: All-Seeing Eye
cards.text:
Exceptional. Uses (7 Secrets).
[reaction] When an investigator at your location would draw the top card of the encounter deck, spend 3 secrets: Cancel the drawing of that card.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location takes 1 or more damage and/or horror, spend secrets equal to that damage and/or horror: Cancel that many damage and/or horror.

cards.flavor: Fascinating Behavior
cards.name: Neuroethology
cards.text: Uses (3 Secrets) [free] Exhaust Neuroethology and spend 1 secret: Choose a non-Elite enemy at your location. Either (choose one): -Treat that enemy's printed text box as blank (except for Traits). -That enemy gets -2 fight and -2 evade.

cards.name: Railgun
cards.text: Researched. [action] Exhaust Railgun: Fight. And your [intellect] to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed, instead of it's standard damage assign a total of 2 damage among enemies at your location (3 damage instead if you targeted an enemy engaged with you with the highest fight) (any additional damage adds to this total).

cards.name: Paper Lantern
cards.text: Attach Paper Lantern to your location. Attached location gets -2 shroud. Forced -- After the last clue is discovered at attached location: Either gain resources equal to the attached locations printed shroud value and discard Paper Lantern, or return this card to it's owner's hand.

cards.name: Post-Mortem Examination
cards.text: Fast. Play after an investigator has defeated a non-Elite enemy at your location. Group limit 2 copies of this card in the victory display. Investigate. If you succeed, add the enemy (and this card) to the victory display.

cards.name: Mathematical Proof
cards.text:
Researched.
Uses (3 secrets).
[reaction] After the last clue is discovered at your location, spend 1 charge: Search your deck for a card of cost X and add it to your hand. X is your location's shroud value.

cards.name: Mathematical Proof
cards.text:
Researched.
Uses (3 secrets).
[reaction] After the last clue is discovered at your location, spend 1 secret: Return a card of cost X or fewer from your discard pile to your hand. X is your location's shroud value.

cards.name: Process of Elimination
cards.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
Choose two different card types -- asset, skill, or event. Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. If this test succeeds and any of the revealed cards of the chosen types, add those cards to your hand. Place the revealed cards back to the top of your deck, in any order.

cards.flavor: Six bullets, more than enough to kill anything that moves.
cards.name: Colt SAA
cards.text: Fast. Uses (6 ammo) [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. [reaction] After you perform the above Fight ability, exhaust Colt SAA: Perform the Fight ability of another Colt SAA you control without spending an action.

cards.flavor: "Be mindful of what is truth and what is a lie."
cards.name: Deishu Kaiki
cards.text: You may take an additional action during your turn which can only be used to parley. [reaction] When you initiate a skill test during your turn, exhaust Deishu Kaiki and spend 2 resources: That skill test gains the parley action designator.

cards.flavor: If you took it off, would you die?
cards.name: Fox Mask
cards.text: Fast. [reaction] After you resolve a treachery card from the encounter deck, exhaust Fox Mask: Shuffle it into the encounter deck instead of discarding it. Then, place 1 resource on Fox Mask, as an offering. Forced -- When you resign or the game ends, if there are 4 or more offerings on this card: You earn 1 additional experience.

cards.flavor: "H-hey, maybe you take this one instead."
cards.name: Cop-out
cards.text:
Fast. Play when you would initiate a basic fight or evasion attempt against an enemy.
Choose another investigator at your location. That investigator attempts that skill test instead. If that investigator succeeds, either you draw 2 cards, or that investigator draws 2 cards.

cards.name: High Value Target
cards.text:
Fast. Play after the investigation phase begins.
Choose an enemy with 3 or more remaining health at any location. Attach High Value Target to it, and place up to 3 of your resources onto that enemy. Max 1 per enemy.
[reaction] When an investigator defeats attached enemy: That investigator gains twice that many resources on that enemy.

cards.name: Inside Bet
cards.text:
As an additional cost to play Inside Bet, spend an action.
Max 1 per round.
Name a trait. Until the end of the next mythos phase, whenever an investigator draws a card that matches the name trai, either gain 3 resources, or cancel all of that card's effects and discard it.

cards.name: Crown of Thorns
cards.text: Exceptional. Fast. [reaction] When a non-Elite enemy enters your location, exhaust Crown of THorns: Either exhaust that enemy, or deal 1 damage. Forced -- At the end of your turn: Take 1 direct damage.

cards.name: Pay in Blood
cards.text:
Permanent. (3 favors)
As an additional cost to purchase Pay in Blood, you must either suffer 1 physical trauma, or this card costs 2 additional experience.
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy, spend 1 favor: Play a card from your hand, reducing its cost by 1.

cards.name: Swiftness
cards.text: Limit 1 per investigator. [reaction] When an enemy attacks you during the enemy phase, exhaust Swiftness: Evade. Attempt to evade the attacking enemy. If you succeed, cancel that enemy's attack.

cards.flavor: Money is the most important thing in the world.
cards.name: Duplicitous
cards.text:
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Put Duplicitous into play in your play area and place 5 resources on it. Resources on Duplicitous may be spent as if it was in your resource pool. When your turn ends, discard Duplicitous.

cards.name: Stakeout
cards.text: Put Stakeout into play in your play area and immediately end your turn. [reaction] When you draw a non-Elite enemy from the encounter deck: Deal 2 damage to it and discard Stakeout. Forced -- When the mythos phase ends: Return Stakeout to your hand.

cards.name: Aplomb
cards.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
For each point you succeed by, put Aplomb into play in your play area and place X resources on it (to a maximum of 5 resources). If Aplomb has no resources, discard it.
[free] Spend 1 resource from Aplomb: You get +1 skill value for this test.

cards.name: Sprinter
cards.text: Fast. Limit 1 per investigator. [reaction] Exhaust Sprinter: Move. Disengage from each enemy engaged with you. One location at a time, move up to 2 times. You may ignore any enemy that would engage you while moving. Gain 1 resource for each location that you have moved to. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

cards.name: Outmaneuver
cards.text:
Put Outmaneuver into play and end your turn.
[reaction] When your next turn begins, discard Outmaneuver: You may take two additional actions this turn.

cards.flavor: The hand is quicker than the eye.
cards.name: Quickdraw
cards.text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a Firearm or Ranged asset from your hand (paying its cost). You may immediately activate the Fight ability on that asset. If this effect defeats an enemy, gain resources equal to the printed cost of that asset.

cards.name: Clandestine Favors
cards.text: Exceptional. Uses (3 favors). Replenish these favors at the start of each round. Forced -- After Clandestine Favors enters play: Lose all your resources. You cannot gain resources. When you would pay the cost of a card, instead of spending resources, spend 1 favor to play that card.

cards.flavor: What she's collecting is not your concern.
cards.name: Roka Numachi
cards.text: [reaction] After your turn begins: Choose two different actions-- Fight, evade, investigate. Until the end of your turn, you get +1 skill value to the chose actions you perform. When your turn ends, for each of the chosen actions you have succeeded by 3 or more, gain 1 resource.

cards.flavor: Money is the most important thing in the world.
cards.name: Duplicitous
cards.text:
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Put Duplicitous into play in your play are and place 10 resources on it. Resources on Duplicitous may be spent as if it was in your resource pool. When your turn ends, discard Duplicitous.

cards.name: Pulling Strings
cards.text: Attach Pulling Strings to your location and place X resources on this card, as strings. X is max 5. Limit 1 per location. If Pulling Strings has no strings, discard it. [free] Spend 1 string: Choose any revealed location. Move a clue or a non-Elite enemy from the chosen location to attached location, or vice versa. Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability.

cards.name: Abscond
cards.text: Fast. Uses (2 charges). If Abscond has no charges, discard, it. Limit 2 charges on Abscond. You may take an additional action each turn, which can only be used to move. Forced – At the end of your turn: Remove 1 charge from Abscond.

cards.name: Magician's Hat
cards.text: You get +1 [willpower]. [free] If a Spell or Ritual asset you control has no charges or secrets on it; exhaust Magician’s Hat: Shuffle that asset into your deck. Then; draw 1 card. It is important to ensure you look the part.

cards.name: Tadatsuru Teori
cards.text: Linked. [free] Exhaust Tadatsuru Teori: Discard the top card of your deck. If it is a weakness, draw it. Otherwise, you may deal 1 horror to Tadatsuru Teori to draw that card. ”Do you feel like an actor cast in a role?”

cards.name: A Myriad of Signs
cards.text:
Discover 1 clue at your location. Reveal 3, 6, or 9 random tokens from the chaos bag. If you reveal...
- ...an [elder_sign] symbol, discover 1 additional clue at your location.
- ...an [auto_fail] symbol, take 2 horror.

cards.name: Holistic Treatment
cards.text: As an additional cost to play Holistic Treatment discard up to 3 cards from the top of your deck. For each card discarded this way, heal 1 damage or 1 horror from among investigators and/or Ally assets at your location. Shuffle each weakness discarded by this effect back into your deck.

cards.name: Inexplicable Sign
cards.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Discard the top card of your deck. If that card is a weakness, shuffle it back into your deck. Otherwise, either (choose one):
- Play that card.
- Gain resources equal to the resource cost of that card.

cards.name: Tenebrous Rituals
cards.text: As an additional cost to play Tenebrous Rituals, spend an action. Max 1 per round. Parley. Name (choose) any non-Elite enemy at any location. Test [willpower] (X). X is that enemy's fight value. If you succeed, defeat that enemy.

cards.name: Doppelgänger
cards.text:
Permanent.
As an additional cost to purchase Doppelgänger, you must either suffer 1 physical trauma or 1 mental trauma.
[reaction] When you would discard 1 or more cards from the top of your deck, exhaust Doppelgänger. Discard 1 additional card. You may add 1 of the discarded cards to your hand. Shuffle each weakness discarded by this effect back into your deck.

cards.name: Intimidating Presence
cards.text: Fast. Play when you draw a non-Elite enemy from the encounter deck. Place that enemy on top of the encounter deck. Reveal 3, 6, or 9 random tokens from the chaos bag. If you revealed... - ...an [elder_sign] symbol, discard the top card of the encounter deck. - ...an [auto_fail] symbol, take 2 horror.

cards.name: Traverse the Veil
cards.text: After you commit Traverse the Veil, discard up to 3 cards from the top of your deck. Traverse the Veil gains [wild] for each card discarded this way. After this test ends, shuffle each weakness that was discarded back into your deck.

cards.name: Dispel Magic
cards.text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Dispel Magic: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, spend 1 charge to discard a non-weakness treachery not attached to a Elite enemy from play.

cards.name: Influence the Veil
cards.text:
Limit 1 per investigator.
[action][action] Exhaust Influence the Veil: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each weakness discarded this way. One at a time, trigger 3 different [action] abilities among cards at your location.

cards.name: Magician's Hat
cards.text: Your get +1 [willpower]. [free] If a Spell or Ritual asset you control has no charges or secrets on it, exhaust Magician’s Hat: Shuffle that asset into your deck and draw 1 card. Then, if there is a copy of that asset (by title) in your hand, you may play it (paying its cost).

cards.name: Psychoanalysis
cards.text: [free] During your turn, choose and discard cards from your hand having a combined total of at least 2 [willpower] icons and exhaust Psychoanalysis: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator heals 1 horror and draws 1 card.

cards.flavor:
"Where does it go?"
"Do I look like I know?"
cards.name: Exile
cards.text: As an additional cost to play Exile, discard the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each weakness discarded this way. Parley. Choose a non-Elite enemy at your location. Discard that enemy.

cards.name: Sift the Veil
cards.text: Fast. Play during any [free] player window. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a Ritual asset. Add that card to your hand. Shuffle each weakness discarded this way back into your deck.

cards.name: Abscond
cards.text: Fast. Uses (2 charges). Limit 2 charges on Abscond. While Abscond has charges, you may take an additional action each turn, which can only be used to move. Forced – At the end of your turn: Remove 1 charge from Abscond. Test [willpower] (3) If you succeed, place 1 charge on Abscond.

cards.name: Automatic Writing
cards.text:
Exceptional.
[reaction] After your turn begins: Name a trait. Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal one with the named trait. Add that card to your hand. Shuffle each revealed weakness back into your deck and discard all other revealed cards.

cards.name: Dispel Magic
cards.text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Dispel Magic: Test [willpower] (1). If you succeed, spend 1 charge to discard a non-weakness treachery not attached to an Elite enemy from play.

cards.name: Offering from the Messenger
cards.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Choose one of the following effects - Draw 2 cards, gain 3 resources, or take an additional action during this turn. Reveal 3, 6, or 9 random tokens from the chaos bag. If you reveal...
- ...an [elder_sign] symbol, resolve the chosen effect again.
- ...an [auto_fail] symbol, take 2 horror.

cards.name: Flintlock
cards.text: Flintlock cannot be played from your hand. [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. After this test ends discard Flintlock. [reaction] After you discard Flintlock from your hand during your turn: Play it.

cards.flavor: "I don't know anything, it's you who knows."
cards.name: Ogi Oshino‎
cards.text:
Linked.
You get +1 [willpower].
[reaction] When you would fail a skill test, exhaust Ogi Oshino and discard 2 cards from your hand: You get +2 skill value for this test.

cards.name: Stoic
cards.text:
Stoic can not be played from hand. Limit 1 per investigator.
[free] During a basic fight or evasion attempt, exhaust Stoic: You get +2 skill value for this test.
[reaction] After you discard Stoic from your hand: Play it.

cards.flavor: "As sins proceed the ever multiply, and like figures in arithmetic, the last stands for more than all that wert before it."
cards.name: Undeterred
cards.text: [reaction] When you reveal an [auto_fail] chaos token during a skill test, discard Undeterred and take 1 damage and 1 horror: Cancel that token (do not reveal a new token to replace it).

cards.name: Contemplation
cards.text:
Contemplation cannot be played from your hand.
Draw 2 cards.
[reaction] After you discard Contemplation from your hand during your turn: Play it. (Max once per turn.)

cards.name: Limitless Stationery
cards.text:
Hitagi Senjogahara deck only.
Limitless Stationery cannot be played from your hand.
Discover 1 clue at your location.
[reaction] After you discard Limitless Stationery from your hand during your turn: Play it. (Max once per turn.)

cards.name: Liquid Memories
cards.text:
Liquid Memories cannot be played from your hand.
You may take an additional action during your turn.
[reaction] After you discard Liquid Memories from your hand during your turn: Play it. (Max once per turn.)

cards.name: Siesta
cards.text:
As an additional cost to play Siesta, spend an action.
Max 1 per round.
Heal 2 damage and 2 horror. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Fragmented Thoughts
cards.text:
Permanent.
As an additional cost to purchase Fragmented Thoughts, you must suffer 1 mental trauma, or this card costs 2 additional experience.
[reaction] After your first turn of the game begins: Draw 3 cards. Then, choose and discard 3 cards.

cards.name: Descry the Universe
cards.text:
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Draw 5 cards. When your turn ends, discard each non-weakness card in your hand.

cards.name: Grandiose Delusion
cards.text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Gain 4 resources. Put Grandiose Delusion into play in your play area. Grandiose Delusion cannot leave play. Forced -- When you would take 1 or more horror: Take 1 additional horror.

cards.name: Impostor Oddity
cards.text: Impostor Oddity cannot be played from your hand. Parley. Either deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location, or automatically evade an enemy at your location. [reaction] After you discard Impostor Oddity from your hand during your turn: Play it. (Max once per turn.)

cards.name: Power Through
cards.text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks you, or when you take damage and/or horror from an encounter card.
Cancel that damage and/or horror. Put Power Through into play in your play area. Power Through cannot leave play.
You get -1 health and -1 sanity.

cards.name: Transience
cards.text:
Transience cannot be played from your hand.
One at a time, move to a connecting location up to 3 times.
[reaction] After you discard Transience from your hand during your turn: play it. (Max once per turn.)

cards.name: Test of Mettle
cards.text:
Commmit only to a skill test during an attack or evasion attempt against an enemy.
After you commit Test of Mettle to a skill test, choose and discard 1 card from your hand. If you cannot, exile Test of Mettle after this test ends.

cards.name: Deceive Reality
cards.text: Limit 1 per investigator. [free] During your turn, exhaust Deceive Reality: Evade. When you initiate this evasion attempt, choose and discard 2 cards from your hand. If there is a combined total of 4 or more skill icons among the discarded cards, this test is automatically successful.

cards.name: Second Sight
cards.text: Fast. Play only during any [free] window. Uses (X visions). If Second Sight has no visions, discard it. X is max 3. Attach Second Sight to your location. [reaction] After an investigator discovers 1 clue at attached location, spend 1 vision: Investigate (your location).

cards.name: Claymore
cards.text: Forced -- After Claymore enters play: Choose and discard 2 cards from your hand. [action]: Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. As an additional cost to initiate this ability, you must either choose and discard w cards from your hand, or discard Claymore from play after this test ends.

cards.name: Hirofumi Yoshida
cards.text:
For every 2 facedown cards attached to an enemy, you get +1 skill value when fighting, evading, or parleying it.
[reaction] After you discard 1 or more cards from your hand, exhaust Hirofuma Yoshida: Choose an enemy at your location or a connecting location. Attach each discarded card facedown to that enemy. (Max 6 cards attached to each enemy in play.)

cards.flavor: "I don't know anything, it's you who knows."
cards.name: Ogi Oshino‎
cards.text:
Linked.
You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [agility].
[reaction] When you would fail a skill test, exhaust Ogi Oshino and discard up to 3 cards from hand: You get +1 skill value for this test for each card discarded.

cards.flavor: "Don't you know that when you sigh, a little bit of happiness escapes?"
cards.name: Quixoticism
cards.text:
Exceptional.
[reaction] After a player card effect discards 1 or more cards from your hand: Place that many secrets on Quixoticism.
[free] Spend 2 secrets: Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Descry the Universe
cards.text:
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Draw 10 cards. When your turn ends, discard all but 1 card in your hand. Remove Descry the Universe from the game.

cards.flavor: Blood comes off, swamp water doesn't. Don't ask me how I know that.
cards.name: Bloodied Suit
cards.text:
The cost to play events with parley abilities is reduced by 1.
[reaction] After you perform a parley ability, exhaust Bloodied Suit: Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Master of Disguise
cards.text: [reaction] When you would pay the cost of a card, exhaust Master of Disguise: Instead, discard X other cards from your hand. X is that card's resource cost. If you do, the resource cost of that card is considered paid.

cards.flavor: They make a study in despair.
cards.name: Three of a Perfect Pair
cards.text: As an additional cost to play Three of a Perfect Pair, spend an action. One at a time, perform any combination of the following basic actions, up to three times -- Investigate, fight, evade, move, or draw.

cards.name: Makima
cards.text: [free] Deal 1 damage and 1 horror to Makima: Defeat a non-Elite enemy with 1 health remaining at any location. Discover 1 clue at that location. Forced -- When Makima would leave play: If you do not control any Ally assets, you are defeated and suffer a trauma of your choice. Otherwise, discard another Ally asset you control. Then, heal all damage and horror from Makima.

cards.name: Railgun
cards.text: Uses (1 charge). Limit 1 charge on Railgun. [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. You may use [intellect] instead of [combat] for this attack and you get +2 skill value. You deal +1 damage for this attack. If this attack defeats an enemy with 4 or more printed health, record in your Campaign Log that "you have calibrated the Railgun." [action]: You cycle the weapon's battery. Place 1 charge on Railgun.

cards.name: Winchester Model 1887
cards.text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +3 [combat] for this attack. Instead of its standard damage, this attack's damage is equal to the amount you succeed by, or fail by if you fail and would damage another investigator (to a minimum of 1, to a maximum of 3). [reaction] After you perform the above Fight ability, exhaust Winchester Model 1887: Perform it again without spending an action.

cards.name: Meditate
cards.text: Exceptional. Forced -- At the end of the round: Put the top card of your deck into play in your play area, facedown. Treat that card as an Inner Peace asset. Forced --if you have 3 Inner Peace in play: Add those cards to your hand. Heal 2 horror.

cards.name: Inveigle
cards.text: Uses (3 sophisms). [action] Exhaust Inveigle and spend 1 sophism: Parley. Choose a Humanoid enemy at your location. Test your lowest skill (X). X is that enemy's horror value. For each point you succeed by, either draw 1 card or gain 1 resource ( to a maximum of 5).

cards.name: Insatiable Hunger
cards.text: Uses (4 cravings). [reaction] After an enemy, Ally asset, or investigator is defeated at your location, spend 1 craving: Heal 1 damage. [free] Exhaust Insatiable Hunger and spend 1 craving: Parley. Move 1 damage from your investigator to an enemy, Ally asset, or another investigator at your location.

cards.name: Nullify
cards.text:
Uses (0 charges). Limit 4 charges on Nullify.
[reaction] When an enemy would attack an investigator at your location, exhaust Nullify and spend charge equal to the total damage and/or horror of that attack: Cancel that attack.
[reaction] At the end of your turn: Place 1 charge on Nullify

cards.name: Sacrilegious Intervention
cards.text:
[free] Exhaust Sacrilegious Intervention and take 1 damage and 1 horror: Remove 1 doom from a card you control.
[free] Exhaust Sacrilegious Intervention and add 1 doom to a card you control: Heal 1 damage and 1 horror.

cards.name: Nazar
cards.text:
You get +1 [willpower].
[reaction] When you initiate a skill test, exhaust Nazar: Either choose and discard a card from your hand, or discard the top card of your deck to get +1 skill value for this test. Shuffle each weakness discarded by this effect back into your deck.

cards.name: Sticking Close
cards.text: [reaction] After you play Sticking Close: Search you hand, deck, and discard pile for another copy of Sticking Close and play it under the control of another investigator at your location. [action] Exhaust Sticking Close: Move. One location at a time, move to another investigator's location with Sticking Close in their play area. End this effect if your movement is blocked.

cards.name: Eschatological Rituals
cards.text:
[reaction] When you initiate a skill test, exhaust Eschatological Rituals and place 1 doom on it: Reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you fail, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.
[reaction] When you initiate a skill test, exhaust Eschatological Rituals and remove 1 doom from it: Increase the difficulty of this test by 2. If you fail, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.

cards.name: Ataxia
cards.text: Permanent. Linked. (Damage cannot be placed in excess of this card's printed health.) When you become the bearer of this weakness, suffer 1 physical trauma. Forced -- When your turn begins, if there is damage on Ataxia: Lose 1 action.

cards.name: The Human Condition
cards.text: Permanent. Linked. (Horror cannot be placed in excess of this card's printed sanity.) When you become the bearer of this weakness, suffer 1 mental trauma. Forced -- When your turn begins, if there is horror on The Human Condition: Lose 1 action.

cards.name: Sanctimonious
cards.text: Sanctimonious cannot be played or committed from your hand. You can optionally choose and discard Sanctimonious. While Sanctimonious is in your hand, you can only commit a maximum of 1 card to skill tests. Forced -- After you discard Sanctimonious from your hand: Play it. Then, take 2 damage or 2 horror.

cards.name: Amorphous Terror
cards.text: Prey -- Bearer only. Ambush. Hunter. Amorphous Terror gets +2 difficulty while resolving the ambush keyword. Forced -- When Amorphous Terror would attack during the enemy phase: Instead, resolve its ambush keyword.

cards.name: Agoraphobia
cards.text: Revelation -- Put Agoraphobnia into play in your threat area. Forced -- After you enter a location connected to at least 3 other locations: Take 1 horror. [action][action]: Discard Agoraphobia.
